response.justification: Maria has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and customer-facing technical leadership in GenAI cloud delivery — key requirements for this staff-level role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud platforms (AWS)
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in experience
Resume name (Maria Rodriguez) mismatches online profiles (Szabo Bogdan) — red flag for authenticity
Lack of demonstrated customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise GenAI deployment
